step_by_step_thinking:
Option B states "Lined by pseudostratified columnar epithelium," whereas the evidence indicates that thyroglossal duct cysts are lined primarily by respiratory or squamous epithelium, making Option B incorrect.
Thus,
\boxed{B} Based on the anatomical details presented in the articles, thyroglossal duct cysts are known to be lined predominantly by respiratory or stratified squamous epithelium rather than pseudostratified columnar epithelium.
